My Dad saw a UFO whilst returning from a bombing raid over Germany in WWII. He was flying a Spitfire and there was something flying around his aircraft at an extremely high speed. He reported what he had seen in his log and later that night was contacted by the Ministry of Defense. They told him that this was highly classified and that he was not allowed to tell anyone and if he did he would be charged under the Official Secrets Act. He only told us when he was dying.

WW Winter Ltd in Derby opened in 1867 and has been taking pictures of weddings, christenings and fashion shoots ever since. The studio - the oldest and longest running in the world - is now bringing the past to life using 21st century AI technology. Modern methods have been used to digitise the studio's vast archive and to bring colour and even movement to photos shot 159 years ago.
